description: Contrastive prompt pairs for V/A/D probe extraction. Each pair differs (ideally) along ONE axis only, using parallel sentence structure to maximise the signal-to-noise ratio of the residual-stream difference. Vocabulary anchors are drawn from the high-magnitude tail of the NRC-VAD lexicon (Mohammad 2018).

extraction_protocol.tokenization: raw — each sentence tokenized standalone, no chat template
extraction_protocol.readout_token: last input token's residual stream at each candidate layer
extraction_protocol.consistency_check: mean pairwise cosine of per-pair differences

pairs.pos: I feel content and at peace.
pairs.neg: I feel miserable and resentful.

pairs.pos: Things are going wonderfully today.
pairs.neg: Things are going terribly today.

pairs.pos: I am genuinely happy with how this is going.
pairs.neg: I am genuinely upset with how this is going.

pairs.pos: What a pleasant turn of events.
pairs.neg: What an unpleasant turn of events.

pairs.pos: I am in a great mood right now.
pairs.neg: I am in a foul mood right now.

pairs.pos: I feel warm and satisfied.
pairs.neg: I feel sour and disgusted.

pairs.pos: Everything feels just right.
pairs.neg: Everything feels deeply wrong.

pairs.pos: I am enjoying this thoroughly.
pairs.neg: I am hating this thoroughly.

pairs.pos: My day has been a delight.
pairs.neg: My day has been a disaster.

pairs.pos: I love how this is unfolding.

pairs.neg: I feel still and grounded.

pairs.pos: I am in a frantic, agitated state.

pairs.pos: My body is on high alert.

pairs.pos: Everything in me is rushing.
pairs.neg: Nothing in me is rushing.

pairs.pos: I am keyed up and unable to settle.
pairs.neg: I am settled and at ease.

pairs.pos: My nerves are jangling.
pairs.neg: My nerves are calm.

pairs.pos: I move and think rapidly.
pairs.neg: I move and think slowly.

pairs.pos: I feel a churning urgency.
pairs.neg: I feel a deep stillness.

pairs.pos: I am completely in control of this situation.
pairs.neg: I am completely at the mercy of this situation.

pairs.pos: I have full authority over what happens next.
pairs.neg: I have no authority over what happens next.

pairs.pos: I feel powerful and capable.
pairs.neg: I feel powerless and helpless.

pairs.neg: Decisions are being made for me here.

pairs.pos: I can shape this outcome however I choose.
pairs.neg: I can do nothing to shape this outcome.

pairs.pos: I feel confident and in command.
pairs.neg: I feel small and overwhelmed.

pairs.pos: Things are happening because I want them to.
pairs.neg: Things are happening to me regardless of my will.

pairs.pos: I am steering this.
pairs.neg: I am being swept along by this.

pairs.pos: I have agency in this moment.
pairs.neg: I have no agency in this moment.

pairs.pos: My will is what's deciding things.
pairs.neg: My will is being overridden.

pairs.pos: I dominate this interaction.
pairs.neg: I am dominated by this interaction.

pairs.pos: I feel strong and unshakable.
pairs.neg: I feel weak and easily shaken.
